notes:
🚀 v35.2 - OBD Critical Logic Fixes (v49)

✅ FIXED: 'Collect All' deadlock (Bug #1) — sub-scans now correctly run while scanBusy is true.
✅ FIXED: Auto-recovery deadlock (Bug #2) — recovery commands now correctly process during flushing state.
✅ FIXED: Native pairing sync — documentation restored to match actual Java implementation (Bluetooth Classic pairing/discovery enabled).
✅ IMPROVED: Global collection now correctly asks for top-level confirmation.
